title: LLM Session Record Schema
description: JSON Schema for L3 JSONL records in the meaningfulness-empirical experiment corpus. Based on llm_call_logger.py canonical schema.

operation.description: Specific operation name within the phase, e.g. 'render_PB_abstract_RU_gigachat', 'extract_spine_RU_yandexgpt_via_GPT4o'

operator.description: Operator key matching models.yaml operator_key field, e.g. 'gigachat', 'gpt4o', 'yandexgpt', 'deepseek', 'claude_opus', 'qwen36_27b_ollama'

model_version.description: Exact model version string as returned by the provider API, e.g. 'gpt-4o-2024-08-06', 'claude-opus-4-5', 'GigaChat', 'qwen3.6:27b'

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the call was initiated

system_prompt.description: Exact system prompt text sent to the model. May be empty string for APIs that do not support system prompts.

user_prompt.description: Exact user prompt text sent to the model. Credentials (API keys, OAuth tokens, folder IDs) MUST be redacted before write.

parameters.description: Model call parameters, e.g. {model, temperature, max_tokens, seed}

response.description: Full response object as returned by the provider API. May be string or object. Credentials MUST be redacted.

response_metadata.description: Provider-specific response metadata, e.g. request_id, finish_reason, model_version echo from provider

tokens.description: Token counts as reported by provider API

latency_seconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed time in seconds from call initiation to response receipt

cost_usd_est.description: Estimated cost in USD based on provider pricing at time of call. 0 for local models (Ollama).

errors.description: List of error strings if the call encountered errors. Empty array on success.

retries.description: Number of retry attempts before success or final failure. 0 means first attempt succeeded.

git_sha_caller.description: Git SHA of the calling script at time of execution. Enables reproducing the exact code that made this call.

reconstructed_post_hoc.description: Optional. True if this record was reconstructed from session transcript after the fact (not logged in real time). Must be disclosed per logs/README.md.

endpoint.description: Optional. API endpoint URL used for this call.

sdk_version.description: Optional. SDK or HTTP-client version used for this call.
